errors.description: Runtime commit, manifest, or policy hash metadata is missing or malformed.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny runtime parity acceptance until deployed runtime hashes are present

errors.description: Runtime policy bundle hash does not match the canonical audited policy hash.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny execution because runtime policy differs from audited governance source

errors.description: Runtime evidence manifest hash is missing, malformed, or mismatched.
errors.fail_closed_reason: fail closed until evidence-chain binding can be proven

errors.description: Runtime deployment source is not GitHub main or an approved governance branch.
errors.fail_closed_reason: require human review or deny until deployment source is approved

errors.description: Runtime commit is known but stale relative to canonical GitHub lineage.
errors.fail_closed_reason: mark runtime degraded until updated to canonical audited lineage

errors.description: Build artifact signature hash does not match canonical signed artifact metadata.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny runtime parity acceptance until artifact signature binding is verified

errors.description: Runtime parity verifier could not complete deterministically.
errors.fail_closed_reason: fail closed on parity verifier ambiguity

errors.description: Runtime parity payload or diagnostics contain unsafe sensitive material.
errors.fail_closed_reason: fail closed until parity diagnostics are redacted and hash-only
